name: Garlicky Shrimp & Cannellini Beans (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces white beans, drained and rinsed
1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley or basil
salt and crushed red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds, until fragrant but not browned.
3. Add the drained white beans, water or chicken broth, and bring to a simmer.
4. Cook the bean mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the shrimp and cover the pot. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until the shrimp turn pink.
6. Remove from heat, stir in the chopped parsley, and season with salt and crushed red pepper flakes to taste.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 2 servings
